prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次 7657、2026 年缩招 25.9%（推高位次数字增大）与物理类考生减少 3.4%（推低位次数字减小），缩招效应远大于考生降幅，净效应为竞争明显加剧；同时电子信息类、数学类等热门专业对物理类考生吸引力强，进一步推高竞争；预计 2026 年最低位次约 6416 名，区间 5916-6916 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (including former Science Category) was approximately 6444→5410→5609→20211→7657. In 2024, due to the first new college entrance examination, there was a significant anomaly (20211), and in 2025 it stabilized to 7657, with a cumulative forward shift of about 12554 places in the last 2 years; the 2025 baseline is about 7657. The university's enrollment plan in Shanxi Province for Physics Category: 59 in 2021, 54 in 2022, 49 in 2023, 42 in 2024, 54 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 40, a reduction of 14 (-25.9%) compared to 2025, intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; Shandong University ranks about 22nd on the Soft Science main list, and the Weihai campus shares the校本部's disciplinary resources and reputation, with stable rankings in recent years; Shandong University (main campus) has had a somewhat negative reputation recently, but the Weihai campus is relatively independent; in terms of Douyin popularity, Shandong University ranks 20th overall (high heat), and the Weihai campus benefits from overall exposure; Shandong University's A+ discipline is Mathematics, A discipline is Control Science and Engineering, and the Weihai campus offers majors such as Mathematics, Electronic Information (Computer/Electronics/Robotics), etc., which are highly related to the main campus's advantageous disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Electronic Information/Communication (highly recommended), Computer Science (recommended/slightly hot), Electrical Engineering (highly recommended) and other Physics Category-related majors have high social popularity, attracting candidates; in 2026, the number of Physics Category candidates in Shanxi Province is about 167,419, a decrease of about 3.4% from 2025 (173,347), slightly easing competition; Shandong University (Weihai) is located in Weihai, Shandong, which is a cross-province application for Shanxi candidates; the university's enrollment proportion in Shanxi Province is about 2%-5%, with limited regional preference impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline ranking of 7657, the 2026 enrollment reduction of 25.9% (pushing the ranking number higher), and the 3.4% decrease in Physics Category candidates (pushing the ranking number lower), the reduction effect far outweighs the candidate decrease, with a net effect of significantly intensified competition; at the same time, popular majors such as Electronic Information and Mathematics strongly attract Physics Category candidates, further pushing up competition; it is predicted that the minimum ranking in 2026 will be about 6416, with a range of 5916-6916.

Competition among Physics Category candidates is intensifying, so it is advisable to reasonably combine aspiration, stable, and safety choices.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category (including former Liberal Arts) was approximately 1010→905→977→2751→1270. In 2024, due to the first new college entrance examination, there was a significant fluctuation (2751), but it stabilized to 1270 in 2025, with a cumulative forward shift of about 1481 places in the last two years; the baseline for 2025 is approximately 1270. The enrollment plan for this university in Shanxi Province for History Category: 17 in 2021, 15 in 2022, 18 in 2023, 29 in 2024, 25 in 2025; the plan for 2026 is 17, a reduction of 8 students (-32%) compared to 2025, intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; Shandong University ranks approximately 22nd on the Soft Science main list. The Weihai campus shares the disciplinary resources and reputation of the main campus, with stable rankings in recent years. Shandong University (main campus) has had a somewhat negative reputation in recent years (companion controversy, enrollment gaps), but the Weihai campus is relatively independent and has limited direct impact. In terms of Douyin popularity, Shandong University ranks 20th overall (high heat), and the Weihai campus benefits from overall exposure as a component. Shandong University has A+ disciplines in Mathematics, and A disciplines in Chinese Language and Literature, Foreign Languages and Literatures, Control Science and Engineering, and Marxist Theory. The Weihai campus offers majors such as Chinese Language and Literature, Foreign Languages and Literatures, and Law, which are closely related to the main campus's advantageous disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Shandong University (Weihai) is located in Weihai, Shandong, which is a cross-province application for Shanxi candidates. The proportion of enrollment from Shanxi Province is about 2%-5% (approximately 4.7% in 2025), which is moderately low, so regional preference has limited impact. Law (recommended/relatively popular), Chinese Language and Literature (recommended) and other liberal arts majors have stable to slightly high social popularity. In 2026, the number of History Category candidates in Shanxi Province is approximately 63,113, a decrease of about 25.6% compared to 2025 (84,879), significantly easing competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the combined effects of the 2025 baseline ranking of 1270, the significant enrollment reduction of 32% in 2026 (pushing the ranking number higher), and the 25.6% decrease in History Category candidates (pushing the ranking number lower), the reduction in enrollment is slightly larger than the decrease in candidates, resulting in a net effect of slightly intensified competition. Additionally, considering the offset between Shandong University's overall negative reputation and high Douyin popularity, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 1011, with a range of 859-1163.
